title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 236.210 - Inquest not to bar right of action, when
text:
236.210.  Inquest not to bar right of action, when. — The inquest of the jury, or the order and permission of the court founded thereupon, shall not bar any prosecution or action for injuries caused by the erections herein contemplated, except such as were actually foreseen and estimated by the jury.
(RSMo 1939 § 10306) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9177; 1919 § 7419; 1909 § 5476
